attachments.function: Front-mounted or mid-mounted between the wheels (grader setup) for leveling terrain or pushing feed/grass in stables.
Large front-mounted brush or an electrically driven radial brush for cleaning surfaces.
Mowing at various heights, including 'topping' plants in the air.
Additional power supply to be installed between the frames.
Power source mounted between the frame for auxiliary power or electricity generation.
Pumping water from ditches for irrigation or crop spraying.
Front or rear-mounted seat, including the option to widen the frame tubes at the sides.
Digging trenches to drain standing water from fields into ditches.
Integrated panels to extend battery life during operation.
Evenly distributing sawdust bedding.
Precise application of granular fertilizer.
Machine for initial crop sowing or overseeding existing grassland.
Transporting and processing compost within the frame structure.
Wheelbarrow-style bin for transporting loose materials.
Rear-mounted hitch for towing trailers.
Ballast weights to improve traction and vehicle balance.
Spreading lime for soil pH improvement.
Flexible arm with a brush cutter or blades for mowing under fences and obstacles.
Spreading straw, specifically designed for use between vegetable rows.
Lifting and transport assistance, functioning as a motorized wheelbarrow.
External hydraulic power source for applications where hydraulic force is preferred over electricity.
Standard linkage system for attaching various agricultural implements.
Soil cultivation specifically for vegetable gardens or light soil plots.
Mechanical weed control using rotating fingers in light soil.
Targeted weed control based on the 'Open Weed Locator' project.
Protective enclosure/housing for the operator.
Improving soil structure and air supply in grassland.
Measuring crop height to create prescription maps (e.g., for nitrogen or phosphate).
Measuring and mapping soil density at specific data points.
